title: athlete-guardian — authorization policies
description: One policy, AthleteGuardianPolicy. Composes the .own scope for guardians managing their own guardianships + admin-scope for HR + safeguarding-scope for the verification actions (dispute, revoke). Consent-recording authorisation (used by athlete::consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian rule) is checked via ConsentDelegationChain, not through the policy — the rule reaches directly into the resolver.

abilities.scope: hr + coach + reception + branch_manager + admin + owner see the full guardian list; guardians see only their own via .own
same as viewAny + self-view via .own (guardian.user_id = current_user_id)
hr + reception + branch_manager + admin + owner. Refuses on tier limit exceeded
hr + branch_manager + admin + owner. Self-update via .own limited to non-legal-custody fields (guardians can toggle their own communications preference but not their has_legal_custody)
hr + admin + owner. Refuses on sole-guardian-of-minor
hr + admin + owner. Refuses on non-verified guardian
hr + safeguarding_officer + owner. Enterprise-only when athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is on
hr + safeguarding_officer + admin + owner. Terminal transition
